'''bayushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leachianone|leachianone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leachianone|leachianone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bayushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæyishith|bæyishith]] || [[word:bæyishij|bæyishij]] || [[word:bæyishish|bæyishish]] || [[word:bæyishi|bæyishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bayuyushuth|bayuyushuth]] || [[word:bayuyushuj|bayuyushuj]] || [[word:bayuyushush|bayuyushush]] || [[word:bayuyushu|bayuyushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bayushuth|bayushuth]] || [[word:bayushuj|bayushuj]] || [[word:bayushush|bayushush]] || [[word:bayushu|bayushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bayufshuth|bayufshuth]] || [[word:bayufshuj|bayufshuj]] || [[word:bayufshush|bayufshush]] || [[word:bayufshuf|bayufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bayushuthu|bayushuthu]] || [[word:bayushuju|bayushuju]] || [[word:bayushushu|bayushushu]] || [[word:bayushuku|bayushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bayushuth|bayushuth]] || [[word:bayushuj|bayushuj]] || [[word:bayushush|bayushush]] || [[word:bayushu|bayushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bayushuthul|bayushuthul]] || [[word:bayushujul|bayushujul]] || [[word:bayushushul|bayushushul]] || [[word:bayushukul|bayushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bayushuthuthu|bayushuthuthu]] || [[word:bayushujuju|bayushujuju]] || [[word:bayushushushu|bayushushushu]] || [[word:bayushuku|bayushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bayushuthun|bayushuthun]] || [[word:bayushujun|bayushujun]] || [[word:bayushushun|bayushushun]] || [[word:bayushukun|bayushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bayushuthuoro|bayushuthuoro]] || [[word:bayushujuoro|bayushujuoro]] || [[word:bayushushuoro|bayushushuoro]] || [[word:bayushukuoro|bayushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
